name: Credit card payment method details are retrieved

steps.name: Given that checkout host is configured through environment variable
And the checkout NPG environment variables are configured
Given the credit card payment method id is resolved
When the user retrieves the credit card payment method details
Then the response has status code 200
And the payment method is CARDS with paymentTypeCode CP

fullName: Checkout eCommerce — NPG payment gateway: Credit card payment method details are retrieved
